summary: Phase M0 has been corrected against the authoritative 2026-07-21 verifier report without adding implementation code or M1+ scope. The seven Draft specs now define exact dependency pin and SPDX normalization rules, finite release evidence and approval inventories, a closed doctor-row union, complete performance workload/result/statistics contracts with baseline-relative comparator arithmetic and fixed digests, corpus topology/fault/count invariants, owner-reconciled resource limits, one byte-identical m0_input_acquisition profile, and acyclic pull-request/release secret-scan ordering. SPECS.md retains accurate M0 Draft statuses and dependencies. No owner clarification is required.
